name: Codebase Knowledge Files

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Codebase Knowledge Files is complete and correct

scope:
Codebase knowledge files per spec .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-22T08-00Z-codebase-knowledge.md

New artifact type: living knowledge files that accumulate codebase-specific learnings across tasks. Agents read them every iteration and update them when they discover something non-obvious. Token-budgeted with explicit pruning.

Key deliverables:
- .wolfcastle/docs/knowledge/<namespace>.md file location and format
- ContextBuilder injection: read knowledge file each iteration and inject under '## Codebase Knowledge' section (after universal/class guidance, before audit context)
- CLI commands: wolfcastle knowledge add, wolfcastle knowledge show, wolfcastle knowledge edit, wolfcastle knowledge prune
- Token budget enforcement (knowledge.max_tokens, default 2000): fail on overflow with error, no silent truncation
- Daemon maintenance task creation when file exceeds budget
- Execute prompt update (execute.md): instruct agents to update knowledge file when discovering non-obvious codebase facts
- Documentation pass: docs/humans/how-it-works.md, docs/humans/configuration.md, docs/humans/cli/ pages, AGENTS.md, docs/agents/, README
success_criteria: Knowledge config section exists with max_tokens default of 2000
All four CLI commands (add, show, edit, prune) are functional and registered
ContextBuilder injects knowledge content between class guidance and AARs
Daemon creates maintenance task when knowledge file exceeds token budget
execute.md instructs agents to record non-obvious codebase learnings
All human and agent documentation updated to cover knowledge files
wolfcastle knowledge add fails with error on budget overflow, never silently truncates

breadcrumbs.text: Created 4 children: knowledge-config-and-storage, knowledge-cli-commands, pipeline-integration, documentation. Ordering: config and storage utilities first (foundation), CLI commands second (builds on storage layer), pipeline integration third (ContextBuilder + daemon + execute prompt, builds on knowledge reading), documentation last (requires all implementation to be complete before documenting). All children are leaves; the scope is well-defined enough that no sub-orchestrators are needed. Spec reference: 2026-03-22T08-00Z-codebase-knowledge.md.

escalations.description: ContextBuilder contract spec (2026-03-18T23-11Z-contextbuilder-contract.md) line 119 states 'Build does not return an error' but Build actually returns an error when taskID is not found in ns.Tasks. This predates the pipeline-integration node's work (the error-returning behavior was part of the original ContextBuilder implementation). The spec's Error Behavior section should be corrected to document that Build returns a wrapped error containing both the node address and the missing task ID.

gofmt violations in 3 test files (internal/daemon/coverage_test.go, internal/daemon/iteration_test.go, internal/knowledge/knowledge_test.go) cause make lint to fail. Pre-existing, not introduced by any task in this node.
